task_completion.description: Verify that Stellarium is set to Cusco, Peru and the date is set to June 21, 1450.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom status bar or the Location/Date & Time windows in Stellarium should display 'Cusco' (or Earth, 3400m) and the date '1450-06-21' (or similar format for the year 1450).

task_completion.description: Verify that the atmosphere and ground are disabled, and the Milky Way intensity is increased.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky should be completely black without a blue atmospheric glow, there should be no landscape/ground visible at the bottom, and the Milky Way should appear exceptionally bright and prominent.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Inca sky culture is selected with constellation lines and art enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Constellation lines and artistic illustrations of Inca constellations should be visible on the sky map.

task_completion.description: Verify that Alpha Centauri is located and the 'Llama' dark constellation is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Alpha Centauri (Rigil Kentaurus) should be selected or centered in the view, and the large 'Llama' (Yacana) dark constellation shape should be clearly visible in the bright Milky Way band.

task_completion.description: Verify that the lecture notes file was created with the required content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor should be open showing a file named 'inca_lecture_notes.txt' (saved on the Desktop) containing text that mentions Cusco, June 1450, the Inca sky culture, and explains that the Llama is a dark constellation marked by Alpha Centauri.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Stellarium application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the authentic Stellarium GUI being used to change settings, rather than just terminal commands or a web browser.

integrity.description: Ensure the lecture notes were created in a standard text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The notes should be visible in a text editor (like gedit, nano, or mousepad) rather than just echoed via a terminal script.

integrity.description: Ensure the screenshot of the constellation is from the agent's Stellarium session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The view of the Llama constellation should match the Stellarium UI context seen in other screenshots, not an image downloaded from the internet or a pre-existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Cusco, Peru (-13.53° lat, -71.97° lon). Target Date: June 21, 1450, 03:00 UTC. Sky Culture: 'inca'. Milky Way Intensity: >= 4.0. Notes Path: /home/ga/Desktop/inca_lecture_notes.txt. Screenshots Directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
